title: New Infinty Fix
description: Removes the need to have an arrow to use infinity on a bow.
body:
# Fixes the Infinity Enchant

### Features:
- Removes the need to have an arrow to use infinity on a bow.

 
Unofficial Fabric Mod port of [Infinity Fix (Fabric)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/infinity-fix "Infinity Fix (Fabric)") every issue relating to this mod needs to be posted on my GitHub [Issues](https://github.com/MrLoLf/InfinityFix/issues "Issues") tab.

If you want to use **infinity** and **mending** to be **applied together**, install this [**mod**](https://modrinth.com/mod/infinity-and-mending "mod").

**Only Needed Server-Side**
